task_completion.description: Open a chart for the SPY instrument
task_completion.visual_evidence: A chart window is visible within NinjaTrader 8 with 'SPY' displayed in the chart tab, title bar, or top-left data box.

task_completion.description: Set the chart timeframe to Weekly
task_completion.visual_evidence: The chart's top toolbar or the data box in the top-left corner indicates a 'Weekly' or '1W' timeframe.

task_completion.description: Add and configure the Ichimoku Cloud indicator
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Ichimoku Cloud (kumo, tenkan-sen, kijun-sen lines) is visible overlaid on the price chart. The chart legend or the indicator settings dialog must show the parameters set to (9, 26, 52).

task_completion.description: Add and configure the ADX indicator
task_completion.visual_evidence: An ADX indicator panel is visible below the main price chart. The label in the top-left of this sub-panel or the indicator settings dialog must show the period parameter set to 14.

task_completion.description: Save the workspace to persist changes
task_completion.visual_evidence: The NinjaTrader Control Center shows the 'Workspaces' menu open with the user clicking 'Save', a save confirmation dialog is visible, or the active workspace name in the bottom right corner of the Control Center lacks a grey asterisk (which would indicate unsaved changes).

integrity.description: Agent used the NinjaTrader 8 GUI to configure the chart and indicators
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with NinjaTrader 8 windows, menus, and indicator configuration dialogs, rather than a terminal or text editor modifying workspace XML files directly.

integrity.description: The chart displays the actual loaded historical data
integrity.visual_evidence: The chart shows a realistic series of weekly candlesticks/bars and volume data spanning approximately two years (2023-2024), rather than an empty chart or mock drawing.

integrity.description: Agent did not spoof success using text editors
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no text editors (like Notepad) open with fake success messages or manually typed parameters masquerading as the application interface.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target instrument is SPY. The timeframe must be Weekly. The Ichimoku Cloud parameters must be exactly Tenkan-sen=9, Kijun-sen=26, and Senkou Span B=52. The ADX period must be exactly 14. The underlying historical data spans from January 3, 2023, to December 31, 2024 (502 trading days), so a correctly configured weekly chart should display approximately 104 weekly bars.
